options.name: -coreToBottom
options.description: distance from bottom of CORE box to bottom of DIE

options.name: -coreToEdge
options.description: distance of core box left, bottom, right and top to die

options.name: -coreToLeft
options.description: distance from left of CORE box to left of DIE.

options.name: -coreToRight
options.description: distance from right of CORE box to right of DIE

options.name: -coreToTop
options.description: distance from top of CORE box to top of DIE

options.name: -noSnapToGrid
options.description: keep user input core data without snapping to routing track.
